entry.title: Entry #1430 in The New York Times Company v. Microsoft Corporation, 1:23-cv-11195
entry.summary: Appear Pro Hac Vice

entry.title: Entry #1428 in The New York Times Company v. Microsoft Corporation, 1:23-cv-11195
entry.summary: ***SEALED*** MOTION for Sanctions Against OpenAI. Document filed by Chicago Tribune Company, LLC, DP Media Network, LLC, Daily News LP, Northwest Publications, LLC, ORB Publishing, LLC, Orlando Sentinel Communications Company, LLC, San Jose Mercury-News, LLC, Sun-sentinel Company, LLC, The New York Times Company. (Attachments: # 1 Affidavit J. Maisel Declaration In Support of News Plaintiffs Motion for Sanctions, # 2 Exhibit 2 - April 8, 2026 deposition of John Vincent Monaco, # 3 Exhibit 3 - Declaration of John Vincent Monaco In Support of OpenAI Defendants Supplemental Opposition to News Plaintiffs Motion Regarding Output Logs, # 4 Exhibit 10 - June 3, 2024 email reflecting OpenAIs initial search terms for the NYT litigation, # 5 Exhibit 11 - Letter dated February 12, 2025, from counsel of The Times on behalf of News Plaintiffs to counsel of the OpenAI Defendants., # 6 Exhibit 17 - Letter dated March 19, 2025 from counsel of the OpenAI Defendants to counsel of the News Plaintiffs, # 7 Exhibit 18 - Email correspondence dated March 25, 2025 from counsel of the News Plaintiffs to counsel of the OpenAI Defendants, # 8 Exhibit 19 - Email correspondence dated June 5, 2025 from counsel of the News Plaintiffs to counsel of the OpenAI Defendants, # 9 Exhibit 20 - Email correspondence dated June 23, 2025 from counsel of the OpenAI Defendants to counsel of the News Plaintiffs, # 10 Exhibit 23 - OpenAI Defendants Supplemental Responses and Objections to Daily News Plaintiffs Interrogatories (Nos. 12, 14, and 15), # 11 Exhibit 25 - January 27, 2026 deposition of John Vincent Monaco, # 12 Exhibit 26 - January 27, 2026 deposition of John Vincent Monaco, # 13 Exhibit 27 - Excerpt of the Opening Expert Report of Tom Goldstein, Ph.D., dated April 24, 2026, # 14 Exhibit 28 - Excerpt of the transcript of the January 29, 2025 deposition of Michael Trinh, # 15 Exhibit 32 - Declaration of John Vincent Monaco In Support of OpenAI Defendants Opposition to News Plaintiffs Motion Regarding Output Logs, # 16 Exhibit 33 - Email correspondence dated January 22, 2026 from counsel of the OpenAI Defendants to counsel of the News Plaintiffs, # 17 Exhibit 34 - January 28, 2026 deposition of John Vincent Monaco, # 18 Exhibit 36 - OPCO_MDL_004898640-59, # 19 Exhibit 37 - Email correspondence dated May 18, 2026 from counsel of the OpenAI Defendants to counsel of the News Plaintiffs, # 20 Exhibit 40 - OpenAI Defendants August 27, 2025 Amended Clawback and Supplemental Privilege Log, # 21 Exhibit 41 - Letter dated March 31, 2025 from counsel of the OpenAI Defendants to counsel of the News Plaintiffs, # 22 Exhibit 44 - MSFT_AI_MDL_002294528, # 23 Exhibit 45 - OPCO_MDL_004391584, # 24 Exhibit 46 - OPCO_MDL_001698810, # 25 Exhibit 47 - OPCO_MDL_001841459, # 26 Exhibit 48 -OPCO_MDL_001841462, # 27 Exhibit 49 - OPCO_MDL_001841466, # 28 Exhibit 50 - OPCO_MDL_004835856, # 29 Exhibit 51 - OPCO_MDL_004598931, # 30 Exhibit 52 - OPCO_MDL_001805669, # 31 Exhibit 58 - Letter dated May 20, 2025 from counsel of the News Plaintiffs to counsel of the OpenAI Defendants)Filed In Associated Cases: 1:25-md-03143-SHS-OTW, 1:23-cv-11195-SHS-OTWMotion or Order to File Under Seal: 1616 .(Lieberman, Steven) (Entered: 07/09/2026)

entry.title: Entry #1427 in The New York Times Company v. Microsoft Corporation, 1:23-cv-11195
entry.summary: MOTION for Leave to File Memorandum of Law Exceeding Word Limit . Document filed by Chicago Tribune Company, LLC, DP Media Network, LLC, Daily News LP, Northwest Publications, LLC, ORB Publishing, LLC, Orlando Sentinel Communications Company, LLC, San Jose Mercury-News, LLC, Sun-sentinel Company, LLC, The New York Times Company. (Attachments: # 1 Appendix Memorandum of Law in Support of News Plaintiffs' Motion for Sanctions Against OpenAI, # 2 Affidavit J. Maisel Declaration In Support of News Plaintiffs' Motion for Sanctions, # 3 Exhibit 1 - September 12, 2024 Conference before Magistrate Judge Wang, # 4 Exhibit 2 - April 8, 2026 deposition of John Vincent Monaco, # 5 Exhibit 3 - May 23, 2025 Declaration of John Vincent Monaco, # 6 Exhibit 4 - The New York Timess First Set of Requests for Production of Documents to OpenAI Defendants, # 7 Exhibit 5 - OpenAI blog post titled OpenAI and Journalism, # 8 Exhibit 6 - OpenAIs Responses and Objections to The New York Times First Set of Requests for Production of Documents, # 9 Exhibit 7 - Daily News Plaintiffs First Set of Requests for Production of Documents to OpenAI Defendants, # 10 Exhibit 8 - OpenAI Defendants Responses to Daily News Plaintiffs First Set of Requests for Admission, # 11 Exhibit 9 - OpenAI Defendants Responses and Objections to The New York Timess First Set of Requests for Admission, # 12 Exhibit 10 - June 3, 2024 email reflecting OpenAIs initial search terms for the NYT litigation, # 13 Exhibit 11 - Letter dated February 12, 2025, from counsel of The Times on behalf of News Plaintiffs to counsel of the OpenAI Defendants, # 14 Exhibit 13 - The New York Timess Second Set of Requests for Production of Documents to OpenAI Defendants, # 15 Exhibit 14 - The New York Timess Rule 34 Request for Inspection to OpenAI Defendants, # 16 Exhibit 15 - Daily News Plaintiffs Rule 34 Request for Inspection to OpenAI Defendants, # 17 Exhibit 16 - June 26, 2025 Hearing before Judge Stein and Magistrate Judge Wang, # 18 Exhibit 17 - Letter dated March 19, 2025 from counsel of the OpenAI Defendants to counsel of the News Plaintiffs, # 19 Exhibit 18 - Email correspondence dated March 25, 2025 from counsel of the News Plaintiffs to counsel of the OpenAI Defendants, # 20 Exhibit 19 - Email correspondence dated June 5, 2025 from counsel of the News Plaintiffs to counsel of the OpenAI Defendants, # 21 Exhibit 20 - Email correspondence dated June 23, 2025 from counsel of the OpenAI Defendants to counsel of the News Plaintiffs, # 22 Exhibit 21 - January 15, 2026 Conference before Magistrate Judge Wang, # 23 Exhibit 22 - Letter dated January 23, 2024 from counsel of The Times to counsel of the OpenAI Defendants, # 24 Exhibit 23 - OpenAI Defendants Supplemental Responses and Objections to Daily News Plaintiffs Interrogatories (Nos. 12, 14, and 15), # 25 Exhibit 24 - February 11, 2026 Conference before Magistrate Judge Wang, # 26 Exhibit 25 - January 27, 2026 deposition of John Vincent Monaco, # 27 Exhibit 26 - Exhibit 5 to the January 27, 2026 deposition of John Vincent Monaco, # 28 Exhibit 27 - Excerpt of the Opening Expert Report of Tom Goldstein, Ph.D, # 29 Exhibit 28 - January 29, 2025 deposition of Michael Trinh, # 30 Exhibit 29 - Sam Altmans X (formerly Twitter) post from June 5, 2025, # 31 Exhibit 30 - OpenAI blog post dated June 5, 2025 titled How were responding to The New York Times data demands in order to protect user privacy., # 32 Exhibit 31 - May 27, 2025 Conference (PM) before Magistrate Judge Wang, # 33 Exhibit 32 - Declaration of John Vincent Monaco In Support of OpenAI Defendants Opposition to News Plaintiffs Motion Regarding Output Logs, # 34 Exhibit 33 - Email correspondence dated January 22, 2026 from counsel of the OpenAI Defendants to counsel of the News Plaintiffs, # 35 Exhibit 34 - January 28, 2026 deposition of John Vincent Monaco, # 36 Exhibit 35 - Declaration of Krithika Rao dated January 5, 2026, # 37 Exhibit 36 - OPCO_MDL_004898640-59, # 38 Exhibit 37 - Email correspondence dated May 18, 2026 from counsel of the OpenAI Defendants to counsel of the News Plaintiffs, # 39 Exhibit 38 - The New York Timess Fourth Set of Requests for Production to OpenAI Defendants, # 40 Exhibit 39 - Daily News Plaintiffs Third Set of Requests for Production to OpenAI Defendants, # 41 Exhibit 40 - OpenAI Defendants August 27, 2025 Amended Clawback and Supplemental Privilege Log, # 42 Exhibit 41 - Letter dated March 31, 2025 from counsel of the OpenAI Defendants to counsel of the News Plaintiffs, # 43 Exhibit 42 - OpenAI article titled Introducing ChatGPT and published on https://openai.com/index/chatgpt/, # 44 Exhibit 43 - Official Microsoft Blog dated February 7, 2023 and titled Reinventing search with a new AI-powered Microsoft Bing and Edge, your copilot for the web authored by Yusuf Mehdi, # 45 Exhibit 44 - MSFT_AI_MDL_002294528, # 46 Exhibit 45 - OPCO_MDL_004391584, # 47 Exhibit 46 - OPCO_MDL_001698810, # 48 Exhibit 47 - OPCO_MDL_001841459, # 49 Exhibit 48 -OPCO_MDL_001841462, # 50 Exhibit 49 - OPCO_MDL_001841466, # 51 Exhibit 50 - OPCO_MDL_004835856, # 52 Exhibit 51 - OPCO_MDL_004598931, # 53 Exhibit 52 - OPCO_MDL_001805669, # 54 Exhibit 53 - Email correspondence dated October 18, 2024 from counsel of the News Plaintiffs to counsel of the OpenAI Defendants, # 55 Exhibit 54 - Letter dated December 10, 2024 from counsel of the News Plaintiffs to counsel of the OpenAI Defendants., # 56 Exhibit 55 - Letter dated January 3, 2025 from counsel of the OpenAI Defendants to counsel of the News Plaintiffs, # 57 Exhibit 56 - Email correspondence dated January 9, 2025 from counsel of the News Plaintiffs to counsel of the OpenAI Defendants, # 58 Exhibit 57 - January 22, 2025 Conference before Magistrate Judge Wang, # 59 Exhibit 58 - Letter dated May 20, 2025 from counsel of the News Plaintiffs to counsel of the OpenAI Defendants, # 60 Exhibit 59 - Letter dated June 25, 2025 from counsel of the OpenAI Defendants to counsel of the News Plaintiffs, # 61 Exhibit 60 - Letter dated July 18, 2025 from counsel of the OpenAI Defendants to counsel of the News Plaintiffs, # 62 Exhibit 61 - Letter dated February 29, 2024 from counsel of the OpenAI Defendants to counsel of The Times, # 63 Exhibit 62 - Email correspondence dated March 5, 2024 from counsel of The Times to counsel of the OpenAI Defendants, # 64 Exhibit 63 - Email correspondence dated August 11, 2025 from counsel of the News Plaintiffs to counsel of the OpenAI Defendants, # 65 Exhibit 64 - Letter dated September 12, 2025 from counsel of the OpenAI Defendants to counsel of the News Plaintiffs, # 66 Exhibit 65 - Email correspondence dated October 3, 2025 to October 14, 2025 between counsel of the OpenAI Defendants and counsel of the News Plaintiffs, # 67 Exhibit 66 - Email correspondence dated December 12, 2025 to December 20, 2025 between counsel of the OpenAI Defendants and counsel of the News Plaintiffs, # 68 Exhibit 67 - The New York Timess First Set of Interrogatories to OpenAI Defendants)Filed In Associated Cases: 1:25-md-03143-SHS-OTW, 1:23-cv-11195-SHS-OTW.(Lieberman, Steven) (Entered: 07/09/2026)

entry.title: Minute entry from 2026-07-07 in The New York Times Company v. Microsoft Corporation, 1:23-cv-11195
entry.summary: >>>NOTICE REGARDING PRO HAC VICE MOTION. Regarding Document No. (614 in 1:24-cv-04872-SHS-OTW, 746 in 1:24-cv-03285-SHS-OTW, 1190 in 1:23-cv-08292-SHS-OTW, 1425 in 1:23-cv-11195-SHS-OTW, 1615 in 1:25-md-03143-SHS-OTW, 758 in 1:23-cv-10211-SHS-OTW) MOTION for Isaac S. Behnawa to Appear Pro Hac Vice . Filing fee $ 200.00, receipt number ANYSDC-33097478. Motion and supporting papers to be reviewed by Clerk's Office staff.. The document has been reviewed and there are no deficiencies. Filed In Associated Cases: 1:25-md-03143-SHS-OTW et al.(bc)

entry.title: Entry #1420 in The New York Times Company v. Microsoft Corporation, 1:23-cv-11195
entry.summary: NOTICE OF FILING OF OFFICIAL TRANSCRIPT Notice is hereby given that an official transcript of a conference proceeding held on 5/12/26 has been filed by the court reporter/transcriber in the above-captioned matter. The parties have seven (7) calendar days to file with the court a Notice of Intent to Request Redaction of this transcript. If no such Notice is filed, the transcript may be made remotely electronically available to the public without redaction after 90 calendar days...Filed In Associated Cases: 1:25-md-03143-SHS-OTW et al..(Moya, Goretti) (Entered: 07/01/2026)

entry.title: Entry #1419 in The New York Times Company v. Microsoft Corporation, 1:23-cv-11195
entry.summary: TRANSCRIPT of Proceedings re: conference held on 5/12/2026 before Magistrate Judge Ona T. Wang. Court Reporter/Transcriber: Rebecca Forman, (212) 805-0300. Transcript may be viewed at the court public terminal or purchased through the Court Reporter/Transcriber before the deadline for Release of Transcript Restriction. After that date it may be obtained through PACER. Redaction Request due 7/22/2026. Redacted Transcript Deadline set for 8/3/2026. Release of Transcript Restriction set for 9/29/2026.Filed In Associated Cases: 1:25-md-03143-SHS-OTW et al..(Moya, Goretti) (Entered: 07/01/2026)

entry.title: Minute entry from 2026-05-29 in The New York Times Company v. Microsoft Corporation, 1:23-cv-11195
entry.summary: Order

entry.title: Entry #1407 in The New York Times Company v. Microsoft Corporation, 1:23-cv-11195
entry.summary: ORDER re: (1574 in 1:25-md-03143-SHS-OTW) Letter, filed by The New York Times Company, (1576 in 1:25-md-03143-SHS-OTW) Letter, filed by Microsoft Corporation. The Court has reviewed ECF 1574 and 1576. If Plaintiffs seek relief, they are directed to file their request as a gaveled motion. (HEREBY ORDERED by Magistrate Judge Ona T. Wang) (Text Only Order) Filed In Associated Cases: 1:25-md-03143-SHS-OTW et al. (Wang, Ona) (Entered: 05/29/2026)

entry.title: Entry #1406 in The New York Times Company v. Microsoft Corporation, 1:23-cv-11195
entry.summary: JOINT LETTER addressed to Magistrate Judge Ona T. Wang from Sheryl Koval Garko and Ian Crosby dated May 28, 2026 re: Status of Microsoft's Request for The Times to Produce Brand Tracker Raw Survey Data. Document filed by Microsoft Corporation. (Attachments: # 1 Exhibit A - Counsel Email Exchange)Filed In Associated Cases: 1:25-md-03143-SHS-OTW, 1:23-cv-11195-SHS-OTW.(Garko, Sheryl) (Entered: 05/28/2026)
